segments: U.S. Retail Frozen Handheld and Spreads

dependencies: Single-source supplier for liquid coffee (JDE Peet's)
Single-source supplier for Folgers coffee packaging (Graham Packaging)
Green coffee sourced solely from foreign countries
Substantially all coffee production in New Orleans, Louisiana
risks: Loss or interruption of supply from primary or single-source suppliers
Concentration of production at single manufacturing sites
Supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical conflicts

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations on food manufacturing and labeling
Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act compliance
Food Safety Modernization Act requirements
Occupational Safety and Health Act compliance
Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act regulations
Resource Conservation and Recovery Act compliance
Tariff Act and trade regulations
New or increased tariffs imposed by U.S. and retaliatory tariffs by other countries
Extended producer responsibility regulations for packaging disposal
Regulations on bioengineered ingredients and artificial dyes
Food labeling regulations (sugar free, healthy, low sodium, low fat)
Data privacy and security laws (California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Iowa, Minnesota, Montana, Nebraska, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Oregon, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia)
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and anti-bribery laws
Climate change and greenhouse gas emissions regulations
Single-use plastics regulations
State and federal consumer protection laws
False advertising and deceptive trade practices regulations
Securities regulations and accounting standards
Tax law changes and examinations
Canadian regulatory requirements
Diversity, equity, and inclusion policy changes and scrutiny

sanction_risks: Sanctions on Russia due to Ukraine conflict
Potential sanctions related to Israel-Hamas conflict
Trade tensions between U.S. and China
Retaliatory tariffs from other countries in response to U.S. tariffs
Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical conflicts
Increased trade barriers and restrictions on global trade
